title: oshpack
description: A vanilla+ modpack using Fabric, featuring 50+ mods that will work on any server.
body:
# Description

A collection of Fabric-based mods that work on most vanilla servers. Made for both vastly improving performance and enhancing the experience with quality of life tweaks.

Made really just for my own convenience, and as such mods are included based on my own preferences. This modpack has been tested thoroughly, and I can verify they all work together.

50+ mods, you can find most (if not all) mods from both Fabulously Optimised and Lambda's Optifine Parity list, as well as more included for my benefit.

A zip download can be found [at Moddermore](https://moddermore.net/list/KgKQh1Yot6QT).

Every version release has been tested to work.

# Mod List

## Dependencies

These mods are required by one/some of the included mods to operate.

- [Balm](https://modrinth.com/mod/balm): Config library.
- [Cloth Config](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config): Needed by most mods for a config screen.
- [CreativeCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/creativecore): Config library.
- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api): Fabric. 'Nuff said.
- [Fabric Language Kotlin](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-language-kotlin): Support for Fabric mods programmed in Kotlin.
- [Indium](https://modrinth.com/mod/indium): For communication between Sodium and the Fabric Rendering API.
- [MaLiLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/malilib): Common library for Litematica, Item Scroller, Tweakeroo & MiniHUD.
- [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium): The king of performance boosting.
- [YetAnotherConfigLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl): Config library for client-side mods.

## Performance Boosters

Improves game performance.

- [Concurrent Chunk Management Engine](https://modrinth.com/mod/c2me-fabric): Improves chunk performance.
- [Dynamic FPS](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamic-fps): Boosts Minecraft performance while not focused.
- [Enhanced Block Entities](https://modrinth.com/mod/ebe): Reduces block entity FPS lag.
- [EntityCulling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling): Skips rendering of mobs you can't see.
- [Fabrishot](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabrishot): Allows you to take ultra-high resolution screenshots.
- [FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core): Reduces Minecraft's memory usage, since Hydrogen is no more.
- [Hold That Chunk](https://modrinth.com/mod/hold-that-chunk): Prevents the client from immediately unloading chunks.
- [ImmediatelyFast](https://modrinth.com/mod/immediatelyfast): Improves mode rendering.
- [ModernFix](https://modrinth.com/mod/modernfix): Performance and memory usage booster.
- [No Telemetry](https://modrinth.com/mod/no-telemetry): Stops Mojang user tracking.
- [Krypton](https://modrinth.com/mod/krypton): Optimises Minecraft networking.
- [Language Reload](https://modrinth.com/mod/language-reload): Improves language loading and switching.
- [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium): The best general purpose optimisation mod.
- [Sodium Extra](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-extra): Optifine magic, now in Sodium.
- [Spark](https://modrinth.com/mod/spark): Performance profiler.
- [Starlight](https://modrinth.com/mod/starlight): Light engine overhaul.

## Quality of Life

Makes playing the game a lot easier/more fun while still being vanilla Minecraft.

- [AmbientSounds](https://modrinth.com/mod/ambientsounds): Biome-specific ambient sounds.
- [Animatica](https://modrinth.com/mod/animatica): Adds OptiFine animated texture support.
- [Better Mount HUD](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-mount-hud): Better HUD when riding.
- [Bobby](https://modrinth.com/mod/bobby): Near infinite render distance at no extra cost by caching visited chunks.
- [Cave Dust](https://modrinth.com/mod/cave-dust): Adds particle effects to underground caves.
- [Client Maps](https://modrinth.com/mod/client-maps): Save map data locally.
- [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity): (Beta) Efficient Connected Textures.
- [Controlling](https://modrinth.com/mod/controlling): Search for keybinds.
- [Custom Fog](https://modrinth.com/mod/custom-fog): Allows you to edit the fog.
- [Debugify](https://modrinth.com/mod/debugify): Removes common client bugs.
- [Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features): Adds support for OptiFine's Custom Entity Features.
- [Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures): Adds Optifine custom entity textures to Fabric.
- [e4mc](https://modrinth.com/mod/e4mc): Lets you open singleplayer worlds to anyone.
- [Fabric Capes](https://modrinth.com/mod/capes): Adds support for all third-party capes, including Optifine.
- [FabricSkyboxes](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabricskyboxes): Custom skies.
- [FabricSkyBoxes Interop](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabricskyboxes-interop): Adds support for Optifine Skyboxes.
- [First-Person Model](https://modrinth.com/mod/first-person-model): Renders the third-person model in first-person so you can see your body.
- [Iris](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris): Shader support.
- [Item Scroller](https://modrinth.com/mod/item-scroller): Adds shortcuts for item moving between inventories etc.
- [JsonEM](https://modrinth.com/mod/jsonem): Data driven entity model library.
- [Litematica](https://modrinth.com/mod/litematica): The ultimate tool for people with no building skill.
- [Logical Zoom](https://modrinth.com/mod/logical-zoom): Simple zooming mod.
- [Make Bubbles Pop](https://modrinth.com/mod/make_bubbles_pop): Gives bubbles a rising and popping animation.
- [MidnightControls](https://modrinth.com/mod/midnightcontrols): Adds controller support.
- [MiniHUD](https://modrinth.com/mod/minihud): The F3 screen if it was good.
- [MixinTrace](https://modrinth.com/mod/mixintrace/version/1.1.1+1.17): Find what mod caused the crash.
- [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu): Menu for mods. Bosh.
- [Model Gap Fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/modelfix): Fixes the visual gap seen on some item models.
- [MoreChatHistory](https://modrinth.com/mod/morechathistory): Lets you see further back in the chat.
- [No Chat Reports](https://modrinth.com/mod/no-chat-reports): Fuck Mojang.
- [Not Enough Animations](https://modrinth.com/mod/not-enough-animations): Adds new third-person animations.
- [No Resource Pack Warnings](https://modrinth.com/mod/no-resource-pack-warnings/versions): Removes the warning that the resource pack may not be compatible. 
- [Nyf's Spiders](https://modrinth.com/mod/nyfs-spiders): Makes spiders a lot more spider-y.
- [OptiGUI](https://modrinth.com/mod/optigui): Adds support for custom GUI.
- [Particle Rain](https://modrinth.com/mod/particle-rain): Better looking weather using particles.
- [Presence Footsteps](https://modrinth.com/mod/presence-footsteps): Dynamic footstep sounds depending on what you’re walking on.
- [Puzzle](https://modrinth.com/mod/puzzle): More GUI improvements.
- [Reese's Sodium Options](https://modrinth.com/mod/reeses-sodium-options): Nicer settings UI.
- [ReplayMod](https://modrinth.com/mod/replaymod): Record gameplay from any perspective.
- [Searchables](https://modrinth.com/mod/searchables): Allows mods to have search filters.
- [Sodium Shadowy Path Blocks](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-shadowy-path-blocks): Adds OptiFine’s partial-block shadows.
- [Tweakeroo](https://modrinth.com/mod/tweakeroo): Loads of handy tweaks
- [Visuality](https://modrinth.com/mod/visuality): Adds fun new particles.
- [WorldEdit](https://modrinth.com/plugin/worldedit): Ultimate world builder.
- [Wakes](https://modrinth.com/mod/wakes): Wake animations after boats and other entities in the water.
- [Your Options Shall Be Respected](https://modrinth.com/mod/yosbr): Load default configs if none exist.

## Pending

- [ARRP](https://modrinth.com/mod/arrp): Still on 1.20.1.
- [Better Beds](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-beds): Currently incorrectly renders beds.
- [Better Combat](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-combat): Still on 1.20.4.
- [Borderless Mining](https://modrinth.com/mod/borderless-mining): Still on 1.20.2.
- [Carpet](https://modrinth.com/mod/carpet): Still on 1.20.4.
- [Chime](https://modrinth.com/mod/chime): Still on 1.20.4.
- [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn): Still on 1.20.4.
- [Clear Skies](https://modrinth.com/mod/clear-skies): Still on 1.19.3.
- [Colormatic](https://modrinth.com/mod/colormatic): Still on 1.19.
- [CompleteConfig](https://modrinth.com/mod/completeconfig): Still on 1.20.6.
- [FastOpenLinksAndFolders](https://modrinth.com/mod/fastopenlinksandfolders): Still on 1.19.
- [FastQuit](https://modrinth.com/mod/fastquit): Currently causes crashes.
- [ForgetMeChunk](https://modrinth.com/mod/forgetmechunk): Still on 1.19.
- [Item Model Fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/item-model-fix): Still on 1.19.2.
- [LambDynamicLights](https://modrinth.com/mod/lambdynamiclights): Still on 1.20.4.
- [LazyDFU](https://modrinth.com/mod/lazydfu): Still on 1.20.6.
- [Memory Leak Fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/memoryleakfix): Still on 1.20.1.
- [MoreCulling](https://modrinth.com/mod/moreculling): Does not work with Sodium 1.21.
- [More Block Predicates](https://modrinth.com/mod/mbp): Still on 1.20.1.
- [Mouse Wheelie](https://modrinth.com/mod/mouse-wheelie): Still on 1.20.4.
- [playerAnimator](https://modrinth.com/mod/playeranimator): Still on 1.20.4.
- [ToolTipFix](https://modrinth.com/mod/tooltipfix): Still on 1.20.1.
- [JMX](https://modrinth.com/mod/imx): Still on 1.20.1.
- [Litematica](https://github.com/maruohon/litematica): Still not available on Modrinth.
- [MaLiLib](https://github.com/maruohon/malilib): Still not available on Modrinth.
- [Main Menu Credits](https://modrinth.com/mod/main-menu-credits): Still on 1.20.1.
- [MiniHUD](https://github.com/maruohon/minihud): Still not available on Modrinth.
- [NoFade](https://modrinth.com/mod/no-fade): Still on 1.16.5.
- [Not Enough Crashes](https://modrinth.com/mod/notenoughcrashes): Still on 1.19.2.
- ['Slight' GUI Modifications](https://modrinth.com/mod/slight-gui-modifications): Still on 1.19.2.

## Deprecated

- [Advancement Info](https://modrinth.com/mod/advancementinfo): No longer maintained.
- [AntiGhost](https://modrinth.com/mod/antighost): No longer maintained.
- [Custom Entity Models](https://modrinth.com/mod/cem): Incompatible with Entity Model Features (which works better anyway).
- [Don't Clear Chat History](https://modrinth.com/mod/dcch): Discontinued.
- [Farsight](https://github.com/herrbrandstetter/Farsight): Bobby does the same thing but maintains render on disconnect.
- [Hydrogen](https://modrinth.com/mod/hydrogen): No longer maintained, replaced by FerriteCore.
- [LambdaBetterGrass](https://modrinth.com/mod/lambdabettergrass): No longer for Fabric, only Quilt.
- [Phosphor](https://modrinth.com/mod/phosphor): No longer needed in newer versions of minecraft, since they introduced a new lighting engine.
- [Starlight](https://modrinth.com/mod/starlight): Depreciated for the same reason.
- [Smooth Boot](https://modrinth.com/mod/smoothboot-fabric): No longer needed.
